-- USE [p3000datSQL]
-- GO

DELETE FROM dbo.[angebotene artikel] where [angebot-nr] IN (SELECT Nr FROM dbo.angebote where datum > '01-09-2020');
DELETE FROM dbo.angebote where datum > '01-09-2020';

DELETE FROM dbo.__EDI_OrderChange;
DELETE FROM dbo.__EDI_OrderChangeItem;
DELETE FROM dbo.__EDI_OrderElementExtension;
DELETE FROM dbo.__EDI_XML_DeliveryLineItem;
DELETE FROM dbo.__EDI_XML_Message;
DELETE FROM dbo.__EDI_XML_OrdersLineItem;
DELETE FROM dbo.__EDI_XML_OrdersScheduleLine;


DELETE FROM dbo.EDI_OrderError;
DELETE FROM dbo.EDI_OrderExtension;
DELETE FROM dbo.EDI_OrderExtensionBuyer;
DELETE FROM dbo.EDI_OrderExtensionConsignee;
